name: io.github.Backspace-me/sportscore-mcp
description: Live scores, standings, top scorers, brackets for football, basketball, cricket, tennis. Free API.

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default: https://sportscore.com). Useful for staging or self-hosted.
environmentVariables.name: SPORTSCORE_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Override the User-Agent string sent to the SportScore API.
environmentVariables.name: SPORTSCORE_UA
